arts.ttl: Liverpool defenders spotted on crutches at Man City clash amid injury crisis
arts.sum: Liverpool have a number of players injured going into a crucial time of the season

arts.ttl: Daniel Sturridge names 'absolutely ridiculous' Liverpool moment in first half vs Man City
arts.sum: The former Liverpool striker was impressed as the Reds cruised to a one goal lead against City at the break

arts.ttl: Liverpool star feared to be out 'until next year' with hamstring problem in ANOTHER blow to Arne Slot's side after injury to Ibrahima Konate
arts.sum: There was initially a fear that the defender could be out for around four weeks. However, following further assessments, he is not expected to return until after the new year.

arts.ttl: 'Bitter and resentful' ticket hikes slammed as Man United, Man City and Liverpool unite
arts.sum: Supporters from Manchester City, Man United, Everton and Liverpool came together to protest ticket hikes

arts.ttl: Roy Keane disagrees with Pep Guardiola over 'big call' in Liverpool vs Man City
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola insisted there was nothing sinister in his decision to bench Ederson for the trip to Liverpool - but Sky Sports pundit Roy Keane isn't so sure

arts.ttl: Roy Keane disagrees with Pep Guardiola over shock Man City team selection vs Liverpool
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola has made a big call ahead of the top of the table clash with Liverpool at Anfield

arts.ttl: 'World class!' | Salah provides the perfect ball as Gakpo puts Liverpool ahead
arts.sum: Mo Salah finds the space in the box to allow Cody Gakpo to knock the ball in at the far post to take the lead over Man City.

arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand delivers epic Liverpool and Man City snub during Qatar Grand Prix live TV interview
arts.sum: The former Manchester United star was quizzed by Sky Sports F1 on the grid prior to the Qatar Grand Prix getting underway

arts.ttl: Why Ederson Didn't Start for Manchester City vs. Liverpool
arts.sum: Stefan Ortega replaced the Brazilian goalkeeper in Manchester City's starting lineup in the team's crunch match against Liverpool in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola explains why he benched Ederson for huge Liverpool game
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola made the surprise decision to start Stefan Ortega over Ederson at Anfield on Sunday.
